# ADP Tax Export

Viewpoint has formed a partnership with ADP for tax
 reporting only.
This utility sends data in a specific format to ADP for them to process the payroll
 transactions.
Note: This utility is not intended to send ADP data from Spectrum to
 print the actual payroll check.
[Review ADP Tax Interface Procedures](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/bb51e2f0-a743-406b-998d-4a600f7efadb?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..S35UKROzUWOYCBkTkx4BYN8HB5J_VR73neuEqJZROaQ&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Spectrum_ADP_Tax_Export_NEW.pdf%22)
